sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32280" key="e)kku/klhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκύκλ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n32280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">theatrical machine,</tr_> used to display an interior, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:128" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.128</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
